description: Slide-level artifact benchmark with equal evidence, references, requirements, and budgets. Results never self-promote.

deterministicBaseline.label: NodeSlide deterministic builder
deterministicBaseline.instruction: Use the canonical artifact builder with no model-authored layout decisions. Bind only supplied evidence and preserve the required primitive type.

directions.label: Evidence editorial
directions.instruction: Use restrained evidence-led editorial composition, visible provenance, direct labels, and an inspectable visual argument. Avoid generic card grids.

directions.label: Expressive technical
directions.instruction: Use a materially different technical composition with bolder scale changes, a clear visual center, and stronger spatial storytelling while keeping semantics editable and evidence honest.
